title: selaginella protensa
intro: Selaginella protensa, also known as Spikemoss or Resurrection Plant, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is often found in tropical and subtropical regions and has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Selaginella protensa can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or extract, which can be used to support overall well-being and provide relief from certain health issues.
